title: Better 2D
description: Better 2D is a resource pack that improves the look of Minecraft by giving certain item sprites a more detailed, 3D appearance with an isometric perspective. It enhances the visuals while keeping the classic Minecraft style.
body:
**Better 2D** is a Minecraft resource pack that updates item sprites with an _isometric, slightly 3D look_ while keeping the vanilla style and colors. It makes items look cleaner, more detailed, and visually appealing without changing the original Minecraft aesthetic.

This pack will be definitely expanded in the future to bring even more and better sprites!
